segments.text: I mean, Mata's not too far behind.
He could actually take this stock.
I mean, he got a stock in his first game,
and he might be able to get a second one real soon.
Spargo has been a menace with those ledge pressure.

full_text: I mean, Mata's not too far behind. He could actually take this stock. He's doing better than me. I mean, he got a stock in his first game, and he might be able to get a second one real soon. Spargo has been a menace with those ledge pressure.
